messages.content:
<logo>Acura</logo>  
<logo>Toyota</logo>  
<logo>Nissan</logo>  

<watermark>OFFICIAL COMPARISON REPORT</watermark>  

---

### **2020 Acura NSX Coupe**  
### **2021 Toyota GR Supra 3.0 Premium Auto (Nat'l)**  
### **2020 Nissan 370Z Coupe Sport Touring Auto**  

---

## **Pricing**

|                | 2020 Acura NSX Coupe       | 2021 Toyota GR Supra 3.0 Premium Auto (Nat'l) | 2020 Nissan 370Z Coupe Sport Touring Auto |
|----------------|----------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| **MSRP**       | $157,500                   | $54,490                                       | $39,490                                   |
| **Invoice**    | $146,251                   | $49,586                                       | $37,685                                   |
| **Destination**| $1,995                     | $995                                          | $925                                      |

---

## **Quick Facts**

|                | 2020 Acura NSX Coupe       | 2021 Toyota GR Supra 3.0 Premium Auto (Nat'l) | 2020 Nissan 370Z Coupe Sport Touring Auto |
|----------------|----------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| **Mileage**    | 21 MPG City / 22 MPG Highway | 22 MPG City / 30 MPG Highway                 | 19 MPG City / 26 MPG Highway              |
| **Engine Type**| Twin Turbo Gas/Electric V-6 | Intercooled Turbo Premium Unleaded I-6       | Premium Unleaded V-6                      |
| **Horsepower @ RPM** | 573 @ 6500             | 382 @ 5800                                   | 332 @ 7000                                |
| **Transmission**| Auto-Shift Manual w/OD   | Automatic w/OD                               | Automatic w/OD                            |
| **Drivetrain** | All Wheel                  | Rear Wheel Drive                             | Rear Wheel Drive                          |
| **Seating Capacity** | 2                     | 2                                            | 2                                         |

---

## **Warranty**

|                | 2020 Acura NSX Coupe       | 2021 Toyota GR Supra 3.0 Premium Auto (Nat'l) | 2020 Nissan 370Z Coupe Sport Touring Auto |
|----------------|----------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| **Basic**      | 4 Years/50,000 Miles       | 3 Years/36,000 Miles                          | 3 Years/36,000 Miles                      |
| **Drivetrain** | 6 Years/70,000 Miles       | 5 Years/60,000 Miles                          | 5 Years/60,000 Miles                      |
| **Roadside Assistance** | 4 Years/50,000 Miles | 2 Years/Unlimited Miles                       | 3 Years/36,000 Miles                      |

---

<page_number>1</page_number>
